pull_request.title: Update python

- https://github.com/docker-library/python/commit/ced4ac7c: Update 3.13 to 3.13.13
- https://github.com/docker-library/python/commit/858441ad: Update 3.15-rc to 3.15.0a8
- https://github.com/docker-library/python/commit/6cc07b27: Update 3.14 to 3.14.4
